subject: feat(theme): add Vivid combo (cmyk/night), set as default
body:
Add new theme combo pairing DaisyUI's cmyk (light) with night (dark).
Set as the default — cmyk is a clean white theme with vivid cyan-blue
primary, night is a deep navy with matching blue accents.

All 4 sync points updated:
- src/config/themes.ts: vivid combo first, DEFAULT_COMBO = 'vivid'
- src/index.css: cmyk --default, night --prefersdark
- index.html: flash script combos + meta theme-color (#45b5e6/#0f1729)
- vite.config.ts: manifest theme_color = #45b5e6
